chapter_title.en: Chapter on Recognizing the Major Sins for Which Allah {swt}, the Almighty, Has Threatened with Hellfire

text: 4965 - وَ قَالَ أَمِيرُ اَلْمُؤْمِنِينَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "لاَ شَفِيعَ أَنْجَحُ مِنَ اَلتَّوْبَةِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4965 - Commander of the Faithful Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) said:
"There is no intercessor more successful than repentance."
